name: AriaAnnouncerProvider
description: Provides queued screen-reader announcements via an aria-live region.

AriaAnnounce.announcement.description: Message announced when the value changes.

AriaAnnouncerProvider.children.description: Application subtree that can publish announcements.

AriaAnnouncerProvider.style.description: Optional style overrides for the hidden aria-live element.

useAriaAnnouncer.debounce.description: Debounces announce calls in milliseconds when provided.

slots.children: Wrapped app content that consumes aria-announcer APIs.

aria: Provider renders an off-screen `aria-live="assertive"` region with `aria-atomic="true"`.
Announcements are queued and emitted sequentially.
Use concise announcement strings to reduce assistive-technology noise.
